title: Wrong decomposition retry workflow
purpose: Demonstrate that an incorrect split is preserved in the graph but excluded from active context after invalidation and redecomposition.

root_objective.title: Build a focused export workflow
root_objective.description: Create a small export workflow without replacing unrelated storage or user interface systems.
constraints: Do not expand scope into persistence or account management.
acceptance: Exported rows keep their title and status fields.

objectives.title: Rewrite storage and account platform
objectives.description: Incorrectly expands a small export workflow into a platform rewrite.
constraints: Too broad for the requested workflow.
acceptance: All storage and accounts are replaced.

steps.reason: The split is product-scale and violates the requested workflow boundary.
Replace the platform rewrite with small export-specific objectives.

objectives.title: Select export rows
objectives.description: Choose the existing rows that belong in the export.
acceptance: Only selected rows enter the export payload.

objectives.title: Format export rows
objectives.description: Format selected rows with title and status fields.
constraints: Do not introduce account or persistence changes.
acceptance: Each exported row has title and status.

milestones.name: Export vertical slice
acceptance: A selected row exports with title and status.

records.prompt: Manual graph run prompt: reject a broad decomposition, preserve it as invalidated history, then redecompose into a narrow export slice.

notes: The old split remains in graph JSON but must be absent from active context.
Graph-level verification confirms the invalidated branch is excluded and replacement objectives are active.
